heading: Administrative practice; Reserves and National Guardsmen
label: 502 Administrative practice; Reserves and National Guardsmen
text: Membership in a reserve component of the armed forces or in the National Guard does not prevent an individual from practicing his civilian profession or occupation before, or in connection with, an agency of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large (2d sentence).5 U.S.C. 30r(c)(2d sentence), .Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 29(c)70A Stat. 632Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
